use_cases: Display credit/debit card information with CVV reveal in payment forms
Virtual card preview in banking and fintech applications
Payment method selector in e-commerce checkout flows
Showcase payment cards in digital wallet interfaces
Interactive card gallery in fintech dashboards
ai_summary: A 3D flippable credit card component featuring smooth hover-triggered rotation animation that reveals the card back with CVV details. Built with CSS perspective and 3D transforms for a realistic card flip experience. Uses Tailwind color variables and includes chip SVG graphics, commonly used in payment forms, fintech dashboards, and e-commerce checkout flows.
